title: Add Affiliate Video Maker to video_audio
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [Affiliate Video Maker](https://github.com/falconafk31/affiliate-video-maker) to video_audio
- Generate AI-Powered affiliate videos with Affiliate Video Maker.

Fixes #11598

gist.headline: Affiliate videos enter the garden
gist.blurb: Affiliate Video Maker has landed in the video_audio greenhouse. It turns product ideas into AI-powered affiliate videos, leaving the bee more time to inspect the lighting.
gist.summary: Added Affiliate Video Maker to the video_audio app directory, giving builders a listed tool for creating AI-powered affiliate videos.
gist.impact: Users can now discover Affiliate Video Maker alongside Pollinations video and audio projects when looking for a way to produce affiliate video content.
gist.visual_concept: Depict Affiliate Video Maker as a cozy creator workstation: a retro video editor with a simple product card, camera icon, and timeline assembling into a short film. Polly, wearing a tiny director beret and holding a clapperboard, helps arrange blooming code-plants around the monitor to show a community app joining the video_audio garden.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly, the cute bee mascot with a yellow body, dark brown horizontal stripes, small black legs, two black antennae, black vertical oval eyes, bright pink rectangular blush marks, a small happy smile, and small rounded light blue translucent wings, wearing a tiny director beret and holding a clapperboard beside a retro video-editing monitor that turns product cards and a camera icon into an affiliate video timeline; code-plants and small flowers bloom around the desk, with lime green (#ecf874) prominent. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes like Stardew Valley or A Short Hike, dark purple (#110518) outlines, emotionally warm and nostalgic.
